title: Pan-Fried Kartoffelpuffer
description: A traditional German snack made from grated potatoes, onions, and egg. Crispy on the outside and fluffy on the inside.
instructions: Grate the potatoes and onion, and mix with the egg in a bowl.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Heat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the potato mixture into the pan.
Press the mixture down gently with a spatula to form a patty.
Cook for 3-4 minutes on the first side, until the edges start to brown.
Flip the Kartoffelpuffer and cook for another 3-4 minutes, until golden brown and crispy.
